title: Tom Barkley
compiled_truth: Tom Barkley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-01-05 to 2002-01-28), Tom Barkley sent 13 and received 85 emails, totalling 98 interactions. Top correspondents: [Zimin Lu](people/zimin-lu) (8), [Bob Lee](people/bob-lee) (6), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (5), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (5), [Paulo Issler](people/paulo-issler) (4).
